General.Name: Mindtell Technology Ltd
General.Description: Mindtell Technology Limited, an investment holding company, provides information technology (IT) services in Malaysia. The company operates through System Integration and Development Services; IT Outsourcing Services; and Maintenance and Consultancy Services segments. It is involved in the design, procurement, installation, and maintenance of customized system applications for corporate customers. The company also develops and customizes corporate IT system applications on project basis; and provides maintenance and support services for developed IT system applications under the NS3 and CUSTPRO brand name. It primarily serves customers in private and public sectors, including banks and financial institutions, government and statutory bodies, educational institutions, IT service firms, software principals, and other small and medium enterprises. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Subang Jaya, Malaysia.
General.Address: B-7-7, Sky Park @ One City, Subang Jaya, Malaysia, 47650
